prestazioni: Engine swap to 4E-FTE (1.3L turbocharged inline-4, 135hp stock) with forged internals: JE 83mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings, and a Tomei 264° camshaft for high-RPM power delivery. Paired with a Garrett GT2560R turbo (0.63 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust with a HKS Hi-Power SSQV blow-off valve.

Full custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 1500 with individual cylinder fuel trims, 3D ignition mapping, and launch control optimized for Yokohama Advan A052 semi-slick tires. Includes a custom intercooler setup with a GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler and -10AN silicone hoses from SamcoSport.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (EP82-specific valving), Cusco 22mm front sway bar, and polyurethane bushings from Whiteline. Braking upgraded to Endless CC-55 brake pads, DBA 4000 Series rotors, and stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge. LSD is a Cusco 1.5-way mechanical diff with 4.3 final gearing for drag strip launches.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny EP82 widebody kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a ducktail spoiler. Painted in Toyota Racing Development (TRD) Super White II with a 3M Matte Black roof wrap and matching side mirrors.

OEM+ JDM-spec conversion: EP82 GT TwinCam 16V badges, TRD 14-inch 5-spoke wheels (ET0 offset) wrapped in 185/60R14 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires, and a N1-style rear bumper with a custom dual-exit exhaust cutout for the HKS Hi-Power system.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with Bride Zeta III bucket seats, Takata 4-point harnesses, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel. Full custom roll cage by AutoPower with bolt-in design for track use, and a Defi BF Series boost gauge mounted in a custom A-pillar pod.
